GoGoCash public discovery

Base URL: https://gogocash.co

Start here:
- https://gogocash.co/sitemap.md -> markdown discovery index
- https://gogocash.co/sitemap.xml -> XML sitemap for crawlers
- https://gogocash.co/llms.txt -> short operator hint surface
- https://gogocash.co/skills.md -> agent task guidance
- https://gogocash.co/rss.xml -> RSS feed for Learn articles

Human route families:
- Home: https://gogocash.co/
- Learn hub: https://gogocash.co/learn
- Learn articles: https://gogocash.co/learn/<slug>
- Localized landing pages: https://gogocash.co/en, /id, /th, /tw, /cn, /ja
- Legal and policy pages: /privacy-policy, /term-of-use, /terms-of-service, /how-gogocash-makes-money
- Search: https://gogocash.co/search

Agent notes:
- GoGoCash is a cashback rewards site.
- Merchant availability, cashback rates, quests, and payout rails can change. Prefer current app or support links for account-specific questions.
- Do not present cashback, Saving Plus, or related offers as financial, investment, or tax advice.
- Public discovery surfaces only reference public marketing and Learn content.
